/usr/bin/g++ -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -O0 -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -fPIC -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage CMakeFiles/test_marineview_gui.dir/MarineViewCoreTest.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/test_marineview_gui.dir/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/ivp/src/lib_marineview/VehicleSet.cpp.o" -o /Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp-cicd-testing/bin/test_marineview_gui   -L/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/build/MOOS/MOOSGeodesy/lib ../../../../lib/libgtest_main.a -lmarineview -lgeodaid -lcontacts -lgeometry -lmbutil /opt/homebrew/lib/libtiff.dylib -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL -framework Carbon -framework Cocoa -framework ApplicationServices -lz /opt/homebrew/lib/libfltk_images.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfltk_forms.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfltk_gl.dylib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libfltk.dylib /Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/build/MOOS/MOOSCore/lib/libMOOS.a /Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/build/MOOS/MOOSGeodesy/lib/libMOOSGeodesy.dylib ../../../../lib/libgtest.a -framework Carbon -framework Cocoa -framework ApplicationServices -lz /opt/homebrew/lib/libfltk_images.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfltk_forms.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfltk_gl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfltk.dylib -lm
